appliedUpdates.description: Created user-testing.md with validation notes: golangci-lint v1 (not v2) is required due to project config format; --no-config flag or separate temp configs needed for individual linter checks due to disable-all/disable conflict in .golangci.yml

notes: All 14 assertions tested directly via shell commands (goimports, golangci-lint, grep, go build, go test). No subagents needed — all assertions are shell-based validations. No services to start/stop for this milestone.
